author: Quiet Mind Creative
description: Turn GitHub pull request references like repo#123 into Markdown links. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Quiet Mind Creative
manifest.description: Turn GitHub pull request references like repo#123 into Markdown links.
manifest.name: GitHub PR Linker

name: GitHub PR Linker

releases.author: ezrafree
releases.description:
Adds support for linking pull request paths and full GitHub URLs. Select repo/pull/123, owner/repo/pull/123, or a github.com pull request URL and run the Link GitHub pull request command to replace it with a Markdown link labeled with the short reference form, such as repo#123. URLs may use http or https, include www, and carry trailing segments like /files, query strings, or comment fragments; the generated link always points at the pull request itself.

A new Owner in link label setting controls whether these rewritten labels include the owner: always hide it (the default), always show it, or show it only when it differs from the default owner. References like repo#123 and owner/repo#123 continue to keep the selected text as the link label.

releases.author: ezrafree
releases.description: Adopts Obsidian 1.13.0's declarative settings API so the plugin's settings appear in Obsidian's settings search. The classic settings tab rendering is retained for older Obsidian versions. No functional changes to linking behavior.

releases.author: ezrafree
releases.description:
Initial release of GitHub PR Linker.

Select a GitHub pull request reference such as repo#123 or owner/repo#123 in the editor and run the Link GitHub pull request command to replace it with a Markdown link to the pull request. A Default GitHub owner setting fills in the owner when the reference omits one.
